programme.title: Storage Wars Texas
programme.desc: The "Storage Wars" spread to the Lone Star state; the buyers have to be at the top of their game; like oil, these lockers look crude, but to the trained eye, they're as good as gold.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Barry hires two psychics to "see" inside storage lockers; Jarrod and Brandi hope to save their store by taking a gamble on a unit.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: The buyers seek industrial merchandise and antiques; a wine rack intrigues Jarrod and Brandi; Dave and Barry put their knowledge of oddities to the test.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Casey attempts to keep a rein on Rene's spending habits; Darrell and Brandon use their intuition to soar above their competitors; Ivy tries to secretly learn Jarrod and Brandi's purchasing strategy.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Ivy makes money at an auction in Montclair; Darrell finds something that will launch him to new heights; Brandi worries that a hangover will compromise Jarrod's buying; Dave returns.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: The buyers have their worlds rocked in Garden Grove; Ivy learns that there are surprising uses for office equipment; Lisa finds the shiniest bowl she's ever seen; Dusty, getting a rise out of everyone, finds out the true meaning of being a jerk.

programme.title: Late Night Law
programme.desc: When officers in California attempt to pull over a vehicle suspected to be involved in a carjacking, things get out of hand when both driver and passenger attempt to flee; officers in Virginia use a dog to help detain a fleeing suspect; an officer in Arizona chases down a suspect through a parking lot.

programme.title: Late Night Law
programme.desc: On a snowy road in Alaska, officers set up sticks to try and stop a vehicle on the run; in Illinois, officers help a drunk biker get home; Police in Nevada respond to a house fire where the victims claim arson.

programme.title: Late Night Law
programme.desc: Officers in Indiana chase a car full of women; in Illinois, police investigate a man who has allegedly taken dangerous drugs; in California, a suspected gang member barricades himself inside his car as police attempt to get him out.

programme.title: Live PD: Greatest Shifts
programme.desc: In Tallahassee, a man accused of robbery creates a tense standoff with officers; in Richland, a traffic stop reveals a suspected stolen gun and drugs; in Missoula, officers search for an elderly man lost in the woods.

programme.title: Live PD: Greatest Shifts
programme.desc: Officers respond to a suspected report of guns drawn in Tulsa; in Salinas, a traffic stop and K9 search uncovers alleged cocaine; and in Missoula, it's medieval times.

programme.title: Live PD: Greatest Shifts
programme.desc: In East Providence, officers respond to a parking dispute; in Missoula, a bear in a tree brings out Animal Control; a traffic stop in East Providence leads to a trunk full of cash and sneakers.

programme.title: Live PD: Greatest Shifts
programme.desc: In Lawrence, officers respond to a different kind of accident; in Richland, a trespassing call turns into alleged illegal betting.

programme.title: Live PD: Greatest Shifts
programme.desc: Franklin County officers comfort a woman after her partner's alleged stash ends their evening; in Florida, a man's self-proclaimed "training" video leads to legal trouble; in Warwick, officers respond to a reported break-in.

programme.title: Live PD: Greatest Shifts
programme.desc: A man in Florida armed with a sword claims self-defense; in Warwick, officers deal with an unusual bar patron.

programme.title: Live PD: Greatest Shifts
programme.desc: The K9 units are on the chase with pursuits in Richland and Pasco Counties, a fleeing vehicle triggers a high-speed pursuit in Franklin County, and it's sassy backtalk in Mission, Texas.

programme.title: Live PD: Greatest Shifts
programme.desc: Richland officers work together at the scene of a shooting; Sparks fly during a heated chase in Pasco; And a hiss-terical encounter in Greene County.

programme.desc: Ken issues Gypsy an ultimatum when he learns that she's planning to meet Ryan - with baby Aurora in tow. With her family dynamic in jeopardy, Gypsy's got a choice to make.

programme.title: Iris Prize Best British Shorts
programme.desc: Soviet Fantasia: Iris Prize-nominated short film. In this surrealist fantasy, teenager Hajnal prepares to leave their home country and head for England.

programme.title: Paw Patrol
programme.desc: The statue of Chickaletta is stolen by Mayor Humdinger and makes its way through Adventure Bay's underground tunnel system.

programme.title: The Adventures of Paddington
programme.desc: Paddington does not have a hobby like all of the Browns, but Mrs Brown finds out what Paddington is good at.

programme.title: Ben and Holly's Little Kingdom
programme.desc: King Thistle is snowed under with royal duties. He must launch a boat, judge a competition and make a speech at a festival. Can Holly help.

programme.title: Kangaroo Beach
programme.desc: Frizzy and Spyke believe there's a monster toad at the lake and investigate.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa and George help Mummy Pig tidy up the breakfast things. Mummy Pig teaches them how to recycle the bottles and newspapers.

programme.title: Milkshake! Story Den
programme.desc: The story of Sally the Skunk, who has trouble making friends as everyone fears her smelly spray. But one day when she runs into a robber, she shows how useful her stink can be.

programme.title: Jeremy Vine
programme.desc: Start the day with a dose of hard-hitting debate, your phone calls and a little fun - all driven by Jeremy's unique style.

programme.title: Storm & Alexis
programme.desc: Two of 5's much-loved faces team up to focus on the issues that matter most to viewers - with your opinions front and centre.

programme.title: 5 News at Lunchtime
programme.desc: National and international news.

programme.title: Matt Allwright
programme.desc: Matt looks at the big news stories developing during the day and offers help and advice to save you money and make your lives a little easier.

programme.title: Vanessa
programme.desc: Raw, unfiltered, authentic and personal, Vanessa Feltz wants you to tell her what's on your mind. Fiery discussions, a good giggle and plenty of afternoon gossip.

programme.title: Castle
programme.desc: Castle and Beckett investigate when a woman dies after watching a supposedly supernatural video.

programme.title: Castle
programme.desc: A baker found dead in an industrial dough mixer leads the team to investigate the Irish mob on Staten Island.

programme.title: Love Nature
programme.desc: In Walsall, conservation charity FrogLife leads the Coalface to Wild Space project. At Reedswood Park they've repaired old failing ponds to make them the ideal habitat for amphibians.

programme.title: 5 News with Dan Walker
programme.desc: Join Dan Walker and the team for the news that matters to you.

programme.title: Kent: The Garden of England

programme.title: Motorway Cops: Catching Britain's Speeders
programme.desc: Northumbria Police face a daily battle with dangerous and illegal motorbike use. In Newcastle, cops pursue - by car and chopper - a group riding off-road.

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: While investigating the burglary of allegedly empty premises by a machete-wielding masked gang, cops discover the house is hiding a colossal three-storey cannabis farm.

programme.title: Riptide
